tagline: Family-grown estate Pinot Noir in Green Valley
seoDescription: Char Vale Vineyards: a family-owned estate winery in the Green Valley of Russian River Valley near Sebastopol, farming ten acres of award-winning estate Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, Riesling and more.
heroHeading: Family-grown estate Pinot Noir in Green Valley
heroSubheading: On ten contiguous acres in the Green Valley of the Russian River Valley near Sebastopol, the Char Vale family farms award-winning estate Pinot Noir, Rosé, Riesling, Chardonnay and Pinot Gris.
highlights: Ten acres in Green Valley of the Russian River Valley
Estate Rosé, Riesling, Chardonnay & Pinot Gris
aboutBody: Char Vale Vineyards and Winery is a family-owned operation in the renowned Green Valley of the Russian River Valley, a mile west of Highway 116 near Sebastopol. The family farms ten contiguous acres of world-class grape varietals and makes the wine themselves, in small, estate-focused lots.

The result is a lineup built around award-winning estate Pinot Noir, alongside an estate Rosé of Pinot Noir, estate Riesling, single-vineyard Chardonnay and Pinot Gris. Visitors taste in a relaxed, welcoming setting on the estate, Thursday through Monday.

services.title: Estate Tastings
services.description: Taste the current estate lineup at the winery, open 11am–4:30pm Thursday through Monday.

services.title: Estate Pinot Noir
services.description: Award-winning, estate-grown Pinot Noir from ten acres in the cool Green Valley appellation.

services.title: Estate Whites & Rosé
services.description: Estate Riesling, single-vineyard Chardonnay, Pinot Gris, and a Rosé of Pinot Noir.

services.title: Buy Online or at the Winery
services.description: Limited-production wines are available at the winery, online, or by phone.

notes: Enriched from verified web research (charvalewinery.com, Sonoma County Tourism, Yelp 79 photos/54 reviews). Founding year ~2014 per research agent.
